title: Selling Software Without a Stripe Account: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you're a digital creator from Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, you know how hard it is to sell software without a Stripe account. Well, we've got good news – there's a permanent structural alternative to these platforms that can help you get paid instantly, without any subscriptions or subscriptions fees. Let's dive into the details.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip are all popular platforms that allow digital creators to sell their products online. However, they have their own set of limitations and drawbacks. PayPal, for example, has strict KYC requirements and age restrictions, while Stripe has a lengthy application process and requires a business bank account. Gumroad and Payhip have limited customization options and don't support international transactions. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) offers a complete store infrastructure, including Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, with instant automated delivery, live price feeds, and multi-chain QR codes. No KYC, no buyer account required, and 300+ coins supported.

When it comes to restricted countries, PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip often block transactions or require additional verification steps.
